headline: AI agent to build websites — research, generate, deploy, and iterate with real computer use

site_brief.audience: founders, operators, and creators who want an AI agent to build and publish websites
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'AI agent to build websites', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: AI agent to build websites
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can research, generate, push to GitHub, publish, and iterate website assets with real computer-use workflows

summary: This use‑case field guide shows founders, operators, and creators how to use Super as an AI agent to build, publish, and iterate websites using real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache. It covers market context, an executable workflow, deployment patterns, limits, and decision guidance, with structured data for HowTo, FAQPage, Article, and Breadcrumbs.
